summary: Completed testing of Payment Tracking in Order Shipping feature. All 7 features tested and PASSED. Backend API tests (9/9 passed) and frontend UI tests all verified successfully.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - minor accessibility issue

critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding aria-describedby to DialogContent for accessibility compliance
seed_data_creation: Created test orders: TEST_Payment_Customer, TEST_Paid_Customer, TEST_Account_Variations with payment amounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment tracking fully implemented and tested. Key features: 1) Payment Mode dropdown (To Pay/Paid) in Update Order modal. 2) 'Paid' mode shows Amount, Paid By, From Account fields with auto-expense text. 3) 'To Pay' mode shows only Amount with 'not sent to customer' info. 4) Payment amount shown in orders table as ₹X under badge. 5) Payment shown in order details modal under Shipping Details. 6) Auto expense created on ship for 'Paid' orders in Transport/Shipping category. 7) To Pay orders do NOT create expenses.

payment_mode_dropdown.details: Payment Mode dropdown shows 'To Pay' and 'Paid' options in Update Order modal

paid_mode_fields.details: When 'Paid' selected: Shows 'Paid Amount (₹) *' input, 'Paid By (Who spent?)' input, 'From Account' dropdown, and 'Expense Details (auto-added to Transport/Shipping expenses)' text

to_pay_mode_fields.details: When 'To Pay' selected: Shows 'To Pay Amount (₹)' input with info text 'This amount will be stored for reference only (not sent to customer)'. Does NOT show expense fields.

payment_in_orders_table.details: Payment column shows badge (Paid/To Pay) with amount (₹X) underneath

payment_in_order_details.details: Order details modal shows payment badge and amount in Shipping Details section

auto_expense_creation.details: When order shipped with 'Paid' mode, expense auto-created with: Transport/Shipping category, correct amount (payment_amount), paid_by name, account type, transport name, delivery station, order reference

to_pay_no_expense.details: Orders with 'To Pay' payment mode do NOT create auto expenses when shipped

api_tests.test_01_create_order_for_payment_test: PASS - Order created for payment testing
api_tests.test_02_update_to_ready_with_to_pay_mode: PASS - To Pay mode stored correctly with amount
api_tests.test_03_create_order_for_paid_mode: PASS - Second order created for Paid mode test
api_tests.test_04_update_to_ready_with_paid_mode: PASS - Paid mode with expense details stored
api_tests.test_05_ship_order_creates_expense: PASS - Auto expense created in Transport/Shipping category
api_tests.test_06_expense_has_transport_details: PASS - Expense includes transport name and location
api_tests.test_07_to_pay_does_not_create_expense: PASS - To Pay orders don't create expenses
api_tests.test_09_expense_account_variations: PASS - Different account types (cash, company_account) work correctly
